title: skip_serializing_if on Deserialize-only ChatMessageEntry is misleading
description: ChatMessageEntry derives only Deserialize (no Serialize), but its optional fields carry #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]. These attributes are ignored at compile time and have no effect, but a contributor reading the struct will assume it is serializable. A future contributor adding Serialize derive will get the skip_serializing_if behavior they'd expect, which may or may not be correct. Fix: remove the skip_serializing_if attributes from ChatMessageEntry fields (and ChatMessagePush if it has the same pattern), since they are meaningless on a Deserialize-only type.
